title: 支えらえて,見守られて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from an outing, I decide to
accompany Mejiro Bright on a shopping trip.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your patience! Your company is
very much appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright says this after picking out and
purchasing a bottle of perfume almost
immediately after entering the shop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This perfume is a French classic that's been
adored by many for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The bottle's lid is modeled after a bird in flight,
and it's just so elegant and adorable that—
Heya, Bright! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! Good day to you, Maruzen. What a
coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Are you two out shopping too? ...Wait a sec. That
bag...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence! I was just shopping at the
same boutique! Look!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious... Did we happen to purchase
the same item, Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Will you look at that! We did! I'd recognize that
box anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I had no idea you were such a trendy lady, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This perfume's all the rage with the groovy
youths right now! I only found out about it myself
recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see... Well, I have heard quite effusive
praise for it since it came into vogue.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You've "heard"? Hold the phone there, Bright. What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This is a gift for my mother. I thought it might be
nice to send her a little something along with my
usual letter.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gotcha! That's such a thoughtful gift for your
mother, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...She gave me the time and space to develop at
my own pace during my youth, all while patiently
watching over me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That held true when I set my sights on the
racetrack as an Umamusume of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ryan and Dober guided me, and my mother was
there to give me a gentle push forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it weren't for my mother's efforts, I
wouldn't be racing here at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Your mother sounds like a wonderful
person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. Still, what a wonderful coincidence it is
that you wear the same perfume as my mother,
Maruzen. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Y-yeah, it is! Sounds like me and your
mother might really hit it off... Ahaha...
choice_data_list: If you met, you could be fast friends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I believe so too. Should the opportunity arise, I'd
love to introduce you to one another.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
W-well, um... I hope we'd have stuff to talk
about, what with, you know, with the generation
gap. ...Do you think she'd like Italian chow?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Italian... "Ciao"? I'm not sure. Shall I inquire?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conversation continues, and the more
similarities we find between Maruzensky and
Mejiro Bright's mother, the livelier everyone gets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, this has just occurred to me,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You always order tiramisu, Maruzen, and my
mother often partakes of it as well.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No way! Really?! Cool beans! You know what? I
think I got it figured out!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Bright, your mother really lives in the now! She's
totally clued in on all the hip trends!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
"Clued in..." Why, yes! She is quite perceptive.
Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the heart to step in and address the
breakdown in communication, so I just keep quiet
and listen.
